title: Digital Citizen
youthShapedSuggestions: You can find the new badge requirements on this page. However, if you're midway through the old badge requirements, you can still use these to complete the badge until 1 February 2021. The old badge requirements can be found [here](https://members.scouts.org.uk/supportresources/4282/digital-citizen-staged-activity-badge/?cat=11,18,773&moduleID=10).

stages.label: Digital Citizen Stage 1
stages.requirementsIntro: Complete every task to achieve Stage 1, showing that you have thought about the potential risks and how to stay safe for each activity.

stages.label: Digital Citizen Stage 2
stages.requirementsIntro: Complete every task to achieve Stage 2, showing that you have thought about the potential risks and how to stay safe for each activity.

stages.label: Digital Citizen Stage 3
stages.requirementsIntro: Complete every task to achieve Stage 3, showing that you have thought about the potential risks and how to stay safe for each activity.

stages.label: Digital Citizen Stage 4
stages.requirementsIntro: Complete every task to achieve Stage 4, showing that you have thought about the potential risks and how to stay safe for each activity.
